intro: Gymnosphaera denticulata, also known as the spiny club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the division Lycopodiophyta, characterized by its small size and unique club-shaped reproductive structures. Traditionally, Gymnosphaera denticulata has been used in folk medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include lycopene, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Gymnosphaera denticulata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in the production of traditional remedies such as tonics and salves.
